titleStmt.title: SII 4.927: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 927. (A.R. No. 110 of 1893). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkānāstanataṭacitrapatralēkhā
bhūpānāmmakuṭamaṇīprabhāśca līḍāḥ .
yasyōccaiḥ pṛthutaravakṣasā ca padbhyāṁ
rājēṁdrastriṇayanapallavassa Āsīt [. 1*]
tasyāgratō vennayabhaṭṭasōmayājī
mahāvādimadēbhasiṁhaḥ . taṁ gauḍabha
ṭṭaṁ kritapatralaṁbaṁ jigīṣurucchairadha
rīkarōti [. 2*] śṛtvā salīlāṁ vacasāṁ pravṛ
ttiṁ sa pallavaḥ pallavitāṁtaraṁgaḥ . Ā
rāmalēkhāvṛtamiṟṟalūraṁ prādādgi
rēḥ paścimatōtha tasmai [. 3*] Agrajanmatila
kastadanvayē vaṁśakartṛṣu gatēṣu kēṣucidda
ṇḍanāyakaśikhaṁḍamaṁḍanādbādanā
dajani maṁtrisōmanaḥ [. 4*] lakṣmīlīlāla
vālē guṇamaṇisaradhāvanvayēdu(ḥ)
rjjayānāṁ kutkīlapratyagurvvīvibhuraja
ni jaganmaṁḍanō maṁḍabhūpaḥ [.] yatkṛttārā
tirājadviradaradakarairudṛkairuccala
dbhirddhattē mattēbhalīlāṁ jalavaranikaraṁ
sphūrjjitairggarjjitaiśca [. 5*] tēna maṁḍalikama
ṁḍabhūbhujā daṁḍanāthapadavīmupāga
taḥ . rājatētha mṛgarājavikramaḥ kauśi
kīṁ diśamivōṣṇadīdhitiḥ [. 6*] sōmōmātye
śikhaṁḍamaṁḍanamaṇiḥ khaṁḍēṁducūḍāma
ṇiṁ grāmē tatra mahēśvaraṁ rucirayā
bhaktyā pratiṣṭhāpyataṁ . tasyākārayadu
llalaṁtamatulaṁ dēvālayaṁ śūlinō rudrā
drēssadṛśannijōjjvalayaśōrāśiprakā
śāyitaṁ [. 7*] sōmassamuttuṁgataṭē taṭākē
svakāritē lōlatarattaraṁgē . prāda dbhavacchē
dakarāya tasmai viśālaśālēyabhuvaṁ
bhavāya [. 8*] giriśaraviyadiṁdusammi
tāyāṁ śakaśaradivyadiśat trilōcanasya .
Asamaśararipōrakhaṁḍadīpaṁ tadali
kadṛksadṛśaṁ samaṁtrisōmaḥ [. 9*] śakava
rṣaṁbulu 1057 gunēṁḍu śrīmatsō
manapeggaḍa dana prabhutvaṁbaina Iṟṟalūra
śrīsōmēśvaramahādēvaraṁ bratiṣṭhiṁ
ci maṁḍapasahitaṁbai guḍi yettiṁcci
yā dēvaraku nūriyuttaraṁbuna
ṁ dana kaṭṭiṁccina peṁjeṟuvu nivēdyā
rtthaṁbugā nicci yakhaṁḍavarttidīpa
ṁbu veṭṭiṁce . nī dīpaṁbuna kiccina go
ṟiya 55 vīniṁ jēkoni Eṟi
yabōyunipēre dana putrā
nupautrakaṁkā nitya māneṁḍu
neyi Ācaṁdrārkkamu bōyaṁ
ggalavāṇḍu .
Digital edition of SII 4.927 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
